preferredDeck: Google sync recovery and lower Settings pressure
editorialGuidance: Keep the tone concise, professional, and specific.
Lead with user-facing outcomes, shipping milestones, trust wins, and installability improvements.
Demote internal cleanup unless it clearly changes the shipped product.
pinnedHighlights: Stop Google token refresh loops after non-refreshable Drive auth failures
Preserve Google refresh tokens across reconnects
Recover stale Google Contacts syncing state after successful People API fetches
Defer background article parsing while Settings is active
